message:
fix(robot): correct JSON parsing in bead commands

- PrintBeadCreate: bd create returns single object, not array
  Added fallback parsing to handle both formats
- PrintBeadShow: bd show uses 'dependencies' and 'dependents' arrays
  of objects with id/title fields, not 'depends_on'/'blocks' string arrays
  Fixed struct definition and extraction logic

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
